strings.panel.p1.narration.1.html: Things don't look good for Radd in his fight against the Gnarlborg.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: Stupid player keeps getting me killed! And just when I'm so close to Sheena!
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: Quit whining! At least you got multiple lives. I only have to lose once, and the game ends.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.left.html: Wow, I never thought of it that way.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.right.html: Well, you should, so be grateful.
